vehicle_make.title: Vehicle Make
vehicle_make.description: Choose your vehicle make to enable optional make/model/year profiles.

init.title: Settings
init.description: Settings to control the behaviour of this interface

data_description.vehicle_make: Vehicle make label used for profile selection.
data_description.vehicle_model: Vehicle model label used for profile selection.
data_description.vehicle_year: Vehicle year label used for profile selection.
data_description.vehicle_profile_id: Profile ID for enhanced make/model/year-specific entities.
data_description.cache_values: Hold on to sensor values, even when there is no data available.
data_description.query_dtcs: Read confirmed DTCs with Mode 03. Disable for slower adapters if needed.
data_description.fast_poll: Polling rate to use when actively getting data from the vehicle.
data_description.slow_poll: Polling rate to use when the vehicle is in range, but turned off.
data_description.xs_poll: Polling rate to use when the vehicle is out of range. Home Assistant will listen for bluetooth advertisements and update immediately if the adapter comes back into range.
data_description.service_uuid: GATT service UUID used to connect to the OBD BLE dongle. Change only if your dongle uses different UUIDs.
data_description.characteristic_uuid_read: GATT characteristic UUID for notifications/read. Change only if your dongle uses different UUIDs.
data_description.characteristic_uuid_write: GATT characteristic UUID for sending commands. Change only if your dongle uses different UUIDs.
